summary: PR 2720 moved style checking into the pre-commit workflow, updated clang-format hook configuration, added a local style-check hook, adjusted CI to run pre-commit hooks through a matrix, and applied resulting formatting-only edits across C source/header files.

key_files.role: CI workflow changed from separate style-check and clang-format steps to a pre-commit matrix over clang-format and style-check.
Updated clang-format mirror revision and added local style-check hook invoking tools/check/main.py --quiet for C files.
Style-check tool modified; detailed hunk contents are not present in the loaded diff excerpt.
Formatting cleanup for offsetof macro spacing.
Formatting cleanup for function-pointer cast spacing.
Formatting cleanup in macro/control-block brace layout.
Formatting cleanup for else brace placement.
Formatting cleanup for else brace placement.
Formatting cleanup for else brace placement.
Formatting cleanup for nested ternary alignment.
Formatting cleanup for function-pointer casts.
Formatting cleanup for function-pointer cast spacing.
Formatting cleanup for callback function-pointer cast spacing.
Formatting cleanup for brace/comment wrapping while preserving matching note.
Formatting cleanup for multi-line condition and brace/comment placement.
Formatting cleanup for wrapped comparisons and brace/comment placement.
Formatting cleanup for array-pointer cast spacing.
Formatting cleanup for wrapped condition and brace/comment placement.
Formatting cleanup for static function declarations with attached doc comments.
Formatting cleanup for wrapped comparison and brace/comment placement.
Formatting cleanup for pointer-to-array declarations and casts.
Formatting cleanup for wrapped switch cast expressions.
Formatting cleanup across collision helper conditions and comments.
Formatting cleanup listed in changed-file metadata; hunk not present in loaded excerpt.
Formatting cleanup listed in changed-file metadata; hunk not present in loaded excerpt.

what_changed: Renamed the lint workflow job from style-check to pre-commit and configured a matrix with hook values clang-format and style-check.
Replaced a direct python3 tools/check/main.py --msg-style actions src CI invocation and separate clang-format pre-commit action call with pre-commit/action@v3.0.1 using matrix-driven extra_args.
Updated the pre-commit clang-format mirror from v18.1.8 to v22.1.5 and changed hook targeting from a files regex to types_or: [c].
Added a local pre-commit hook named style-check that runs python tools/check/main.py --quiet with pass_filenames: true and types_or: [c].
Modified tools/check/main.py according to changed-file metadata, but the loaded excerpt does not show the exact implementation changes.
Applied formatting-only edits across 22 C/header source files, including function-pointer cast spacing, brace placement, line wrapping, ternary alignment, and function declaration layout.
smart_moves: Using pre-commit/action with a hook matrix keeps CI coverage for clang-format and the project style checker in one workflow pattern instead of maintaining separate command paths.
Adding style-check as a local pre-commit hook lets the same check run locally and in CI through pre-commit configuration.
Formatting source files in the same PR reduces immediate breakage after introducing stricter pre-commit style enforcement.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Style-tooling PRs can produce broad formatting-only source churn; intake and review should separate formatting normalization from semantic decomp changes.
Formatting changes may touch matching-sensitive comments or unusual source shapes; this PR preserves existing comments such as the grKraid explicit-comparison remark while reflowing them.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: No assembly, objdiff, or matching tactic changes are evidenced; the source edits shown are style formatting only.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Pre-commit style enforcement may require repository-wide formatting cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2720 added a local style-check pre-commit hook, updated clang-format configuration, changed CI to run pre-commit hooks via a hook matrix, and included formatting-only edits across many C/header files.

source_update_candidates.title: Document style-check and clang-format pre-commit enforcement
source_update_candidates.text: Consider documenting that C source style is enforced through pre-commit hooks for clang-format and the local style-check hook, with CI invoking pre-commit/action for both hooks.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR directly changes repo tooling so style checks are run as pre-commit hooks; this may belong in source-owned contributor/style documentation rather than as a decomp matching lesson.

source_update_candidates.title: Index PR 2720 as tooling/style infrastructure
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2720 is useful as historical evidence for when style-check became a local pre-commit hook and CI began running clang-format/style-check through pre-commit/action.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is project-process/tooling history and should be routed to curator-owned documentation or path facts if desired.
